name: HONG YUAN HOLDING GROUP
business: The Company focuses on supply chain management services, primarily engaged in the wholesale and internet sales of fast-moving consumer goods, including food, daily necessities, and electronic products. It also develops and operates offline brand-authorized stores, selling Baijiu, red wine, cigarettes, tea, and other products. The company sells to members and partners through store service providers and to other trading companies.
sellsTo: Members and partners through store service providers
Other trading companies and e-commerce platforms

exposures.sentence: The Company, through its subsidiary and the Agreements with Fengcuiyuan, focuses on supply chain management services, primarily engaged in the wholesale and internet sales of fast-moving consumer goods, including food, daily necessities, and electronic products.

Supply chain companies help optimize all the activities involved in procuring raw materials and transforming them into products, as well as managing logistics, storage, sales, and shipping those products to consumers, all of which is done using technology such as artificial intelligence, IoT, blockchain, and robots.

tamClaims.claim: Online sales of alcoholic beverages exceeded 30-billion-yuan, accounting for 29% of the total industry scale.
tamClaims.sentence: Data from 2025 shows that the online sales of alcoholic beverages have exceeded 30-billion-yuan, accounting for 29% of the total industry scale.
